name: Total Choice
description_short: Total Choice Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering savings, checking, loans, credit cards, and auto financing with free credit score monitoring.
description_long:
Total Choice Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered, member-owned credit union (NCUA-insured) operating under routing number 265481888. Like all credit unions, it is organized as a not-for-profit cooperative where members are both owners and customers, distinguishing it from for-profit banks. The institution provides traditional consumer financial services designed to serve its membership base.

Total Choice FCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including savings accounts, checking accounts, youth accounts, share certificates, credit cards, and personal and auto loans. Members can access online and mobile banking 24/7 with features like account transfers, bill payment setup, and mobile deposits up to $2,000 daily (with $225 available immediately). The credit union provides free credit score and credit report viewing through their platform, along with financial counseling services and insurance savings programs. Auto financing is a significant focus, with an integrated vehicle search tool allowing members to browse makes and models before applying for auto loans online.

Total Choice FCU distinguishes itself through member-centric features including financial counseling at no charge, free credit monitoring, and the ability to manage accounts in both English and Spanish. The institution emphasizes accessibility with branch/ATM locators, courtesy pay options, and lost/stolen card reporting services. Their "Pay Yourself First" program and various calculators suggest a focus on financial literacy and member education. The routing number and online banking capabilities indicate a fully operational federal credit union with modern digital infrastructure.

As a credit union, Total Choice FCU is best suited for consumers who value member-ownership, lower fees typically associated with not-for-profit institutions, and community-focused financial services. However, the website provides limited detail on specific account features, rate competitiveness, membership eligibility requirements, or fee structures, making it difficult to assess overall value compared to competitors. Prospective members should contact the institution directly or visit a branch for detailed product information before joining.
services: Personal and auto loans with online application
Bill payment services with overnight or same-day options
Free credit score and credit report viewing
Auto vehicle search and financing tool
Lost/stolen card reporting and card management
pros: Free credit score and credit report viewing for all members
24/7 online and mobile banking with mobile deposit capability (up to $2,000/day)
Free financial counseling services available to members
Mobile deposits processed with first $225 available immediately
Bilingual support (English and Español) for member services
No-charge e-statements with option for paper statements at $2/period
Integrated auto vehicle search tool simplifying loan application process
Member-owned structure typically results in lower fees than for-profit banks
cons: Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APRs, and fee schedules needed to compare competitiveness
Mobile deposit limit of $2,000/day with 2-business-day hold may be insufficient for larger deposits
Membership eligibility requirements not disclosed on website—credit union field of membership unclear
Limited detail on loan products, terms, credit requirements, and approval criteria
No information about account minimums, overdraft protection costs, or other common banking fees
best_for: Members seeking free credit monitoring and financial counseling services
Auto buyers wanting integrated vehicle search and financing in one platform
Spanish-speaking consumers preferring bilingual financial services
Community-focused individuals valuing member-owned, not-for-profit banking
diagnosis: Total Choice FCU is best for credit union members seeking a full-service financial institution with free credit monitoring, mobile banking convenience, and member-focused services. The main caveat is that the website provides insufficient detail on rates, fees, and membership requirements—prospective members must contact the credit union directly to evaluate specific products and verify they meet field-of-membership eligibility criteria.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Total Choice — Credit Union in Hahnville, LA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Total Choice — NCUA-insured credit union in Hahnville, LA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
